mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id ORDER BY p.product_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(product_name, category_id, price, stock, safety_stock, image_url, product_desc) VALUES(#{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{safetyStock}, #{imageUrl}, #{productDesc})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, safety_stock = #{safetyStock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, product_desc = #{productDesc} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.stock < p.safety_stock ORDER BY (p.safety_stock - p.stock) DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE stock < safety_stock

SELECT c.category_name as name, SUM(si.amount) as value FROM sales_order_item si JOIN product p ON si.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY value DESC
